recentCommits.message: Revert accidental commit of in-progress Linux container workflows
Add GHCR auth to CI pull steps; add packages:read permissions; fix Node.js 24 deprecation warning
Fix Dockerfile: remove nipkg list --available (invalid flag)

Switch CI workflows to pre-baked GHCR image; remove tar-cache and runtime install

All container workflows now pull ghcr.io/elijah286/mini-system-manager-labview:2026
instead of nationalinstruments/labview:latest-windows.

- Removed: docker save/load tar-cache blocks (actions/cache)
- Removed: check-via-tests.ps1 runtime install pattern
- Added: single LABVIEW_CONTAINER_IMAGE env var per workflow
- Added: docs/labview-ghcr-image-migration.md migration reference
- Added: .github/labview/vipm/ VIPC hook directory (no-op until .vipc files added)

Add pre-baked LabVIEW CI Dockerfile and GHCR build workflow

Bakes VI Analyzer support package (ni-viawin-labview-support) into the
image at build time via nipkg, eliminating runtime provisioning in every
CI job. Image published to ghcr.io/elijah286/mini-system-manager-labview.

Triggers: workflow_dispatch, Dockerfile path changes on main, monthly schedule.
VI Browser: revision label, highlight changed files, per-file diff badge
Honor system dark/light mode in VI Browser and Interactive Viewer
Deploy vi-browser.html + vi-interactive.html via fast dashboard workflow
Fix vi-browser.html BASE path: strip filename not just index.html
Fix VI Browser link: point to vi-browser.html directly, also deploy under that name
Fix VIDiff: pass file list as CSV string to avoid Docker quoting embedding literal quotes in paths
Add interactive VI viewer with case structure navigation
Dashboard: add Show CI-only revisions checkbox, unchecked by default
Dashboard: only show report links for confirmed reports; also fetch workflow_dispatch runs
Fix dashboard report links: normalize SHAs to 7 chars to match report directories
Dashboard: system theme, filter CI-only rows, fix links to reports
Label CI-only commits in dashboard rows
Wrap revision labels and include recent commits in dashboard rows
Use readable revision labels instead of full commit hashes on dashboard
Clarify dashboard status when workflow succeeds without report artifact
Serve dashboard data from workflow to avoid browser API rate limits
Restore historical dashboard rows and isolate dashboard deploy concurrency
Restore historical dashboard rows from gh-pages report tree
Fix dashboard blank page caused by malformed HTML structure
Reduce dashboard GitHub API usage to prevent 403 rate limits
Show running workflow states on dashboard and auto-deploy dashboard page
Merge branch 'main' of https://github.com/elijah286/mini-system-manager

resized the graph

made it smaller by default
Add per-commit VI Browser with lvproj tree, commit selector, and VIDiff links

Add PrintToSingleFileHtml operation VIs from NI labview-for-containers repo

The PrintToSingleFileHtml LabVIEWCLI operation is not installed in the container
by default. It must be provided as a set of VI files alongside the export script.
Source: github.com/ni/labview-for-containers/examples/cicd-examples/helper-scripts/vidiff/
Search for correct VIDiff nipkg package name, add NI feed
Move CLI diagnostic into export script, auto-detect PrintToSingleFileHtml location, try nipkg install
Add VI file table to README, fix snapshot manifest BOM/empty handling, add CLI ops diagnostic
Fix VI snapshots: use separate concurrency group to avoid cancellation
Fix VI snapshots gallery: pass manifest path via sys.argv to avoid Windows backslash escaping

Add VI Browser: export front panel & diagram snapshots for all VIs

- export-vi-snapshots.ps1: runs PrintToSingleFileHtml (same op as VIDiff) on every VI/CTL
- vi-snapshots.yml: workflow to export and deploy gallery to gh-pages
- Dashboard: add VI Browser link above reports table

Add Mass Compile column to dashboard with pass/fail counts

- masscompile.ps1: capture output, parse bad VIs, generate HTML report
- Workflow: add Pages deploy, artifact upload, commit status, concurrency
- Dashboard: add Mass Compile column showing compiled/failed/missing deps
Dashboard: fix parser to handle LabVIEW native HTML report format
VIA: treat exit code 3 (failures found) as success, fix heredoc indentation

VIA: use default tests by pointing ConfigPath at workspace folder, generate HTML report

- Remove .viancfg config file dependency
- ConfigPath now targets C:\workspace directly (runs all default VIA tests)
- Add -ReportSaveType HTML for native HTML report output
- Remove check-via-tests.ps1 step (no longer needed)
- Deploy HTML report directly to Pages instead of wrapping Results.txt
VIA: fix nipkg feed-add syntax, try multiple variations
VIA: add NI product feeds to nipkg before installing VI Analyzer tests
VIA: deeper probe - nipkg update, feed config, package content, broader search
VIA: probe NIPM and attempt to install VI Analyzer tests in container
VI Analyzer: full 90-test config from NI labview-for-containers reference
Enhanced VIA diagnostic: list all files, try without ConfigPath, search for test VIs
Dashboard: add commit date column, sort newest first
Diagnostic: comprehensive search for VI Analyzer test LLBs in container
Dashboard: combine VIA and VIDiff into single table by commit
Dashboard: distinguish material VIDiff changes from binary-only diffs
Link badges to dashboard, add summary columns to dashboard
Add Docker daemon startup step to all workflows (windows-2022 runner fix)
Fix VI Analyzer: use default tests instead of explicit LLB paths
Fix diagnostic script syntax error
Diagnostic: check ALL LabVIEW dirs for VI Analyzer tests
Fix VI Analyzer diagnostic: use script file to avoid YAML escaping
Diagnose VI Analyzer: check if test LLBs exist in container

Add CI dashboard, status badges, and deploy concurrency controls

- Dashboard: self-updating HTML page at Pages root (uses GitHub API)
- Badges: Mass Compile, VI Analyzer, VIDiff status in README
- Concurrency: pages-deploy group prevents gh-pages push races

Cache Docker image and run VIDiff in single container

- Cache LabVIEW container image with actions/cache (avoids ~5min pull)
- VIDiff: pass all files to single docker run instead of one per file
- First run saves image to cache; subsequent runs load from cache
Fix VI Analyzer config: use absolute container path for workspace
